title: Why did Adin Ross refuse UFC Freedom 250 appearance despite Donald Trump planning historic White House fight night?
summary_full: Adin Ross said he will not attend UFC Freedom 250 at the White House after hearing rumors that Benjamin Netanyahu could be there. Ross shared the decision during a Kick livestream and said he prefers watching from home with his father. Meanwhile, UFC and White House staff are preparing the historic June 16 event, with Dana White and Donald Trump promising a massive crowd and celebration.
